# terrible_netapp_storagegrid_na_sg_grid_info (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `gather_subset` (String) When supplied, this argument will restrict the information collected to a given subset. Either the info name or the REST API can be given. Possible values for this argument include `grid_accounts_info` or `grid/accounts` `grid_alarms_info` or `grid/alarms` `grid_audit_info` or `grid/audit` `grid_compliance_global_info` or `grid/compliance-global` `grid_config_info` or `grid/config` `grid_config_management_info` or `grid/config/management` `grid_config_product_version_info` or `grid/config/product-version` `grid_deactivated_features_info` or `grid/deactivated-features` `grid_dns_servers_info` or `grid/dns-servers` `grid_domain_names_info` or `grid/domain-names` `grid_ec_profiles_info` or `grid/ec-profiles` `grid_expansion_info` or `grid/expansion` `grid_expansion_nodes_info` or `grid/expansion/nodes` `grid_expansion_sites_info` or `grid/expansion/sites` `grid_firewall_blocked_ports` or `grid/firewall-blocked-ports` `grid_firewall_external_ports` or `grid/firewall-external-ports` `grid_firewall_privileged_ips` or `grid/firewall-privileged-ips` `grid_grid_networks_info` or `grid/grid-networks` `grid_groups_info` or `grid/groups` `grid_ha_groups_info` or `grid/ha-groups` `grid_health_info` or `grid/health` `grid_health_topology_info` or `grid/health/topology` `grid_identity_source_info` or `grid/identity-source` `grid_ilm_criteria_info` or `grid/ilm-criteria` `grid_ilm_grade_site_info` or `grid/ilm-grade-site` `grid_ilm_grades_info` or `grid/ilm-grades` `grid_ilm_policies_info` or `grid/ilm-policies` `grid_ilm_rules_info` or `grid/ilm-rules` `grid_ilm_storage_pools_info` or `grid/ilm-pools` `grid_license_info` or `grid/license` `grid_load_balancer_endpoints_config_info` or `grid/gateway-configs` `grid_management_certificate_info` or `grid/management-certificate` `grid_network_topology_info` or `grid/network-topology` `grid_ntp_servers_info` or `grid/ntp-servers` `grid_recovery_available_nodes_info` or `grid/recovery/available-nodes` `grid_recovery_info` or `grid/recovery` `grid_regions_info` or `grid/regions` `grid_schemes_info` or `grid/schemes` `grid_single_sign_on_info` or `grid/single-sign-on` `grid_snmp_info` or `grid/snmp` `grid_storage_api_certificate_info` or `grid/storage-api-certificate` `grid_untrusted_client_network_info` or `grid/untrusted-client-network` `grid_users_info` or `grid/users` `grid_users_root_info` or `grid/users/root` `grid_vlan_interfaces_info` or `grid/vlan-interfaces` `versions_info` or `versions` Can specify a list of values to include a larger subset.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `parameters` (String) Allows for any rest option to be passed in.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `sg_info` (String) Returns various information about the StorageGRID Grid configuration.
